name: SHA1OpenNURBS
summary: Provides the OpenNURBS implementation of SHA1. This class is provided only with the purpose of hashing. It is not meant to be used for any cryptographic purpose.

constructors.name: SHA1OpenNURBS
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of the SHA1 algorithm.

methods.name: FileSystemPathHash
methods.signature: public static byte[] FileSystemPathHash(string path, bool? ignoreCase = null)
methods.summary: Computes the SHA1 hash of a file system path, converted to UTF8. These file system paths have identical values of FileSystemPathHash():/x/y/z/name.ext\x\y\z\name.ext/x//y//z/name.ext/x/y/a/b/c/../../../z/name.ext/X/Y/Z/NAME.EXT (When ignoreCase is true)

params.name: ignoreCase
params.doc: If case should be ignored. If this is null or unspecified, the operating system default is used.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Instructs the runtime to reclaim unmanaged resources if the developer forgot to call Dispose().

methods.name: Initialize
methods.summary: Resets this instance of the algorithm, so that it can be used again. It is not required to call this method after creation.

methods.name: StringHash
methods.summary: Computes the SHA1 hash of a string, converted to UTF8.
